display_name: Someone Set Up Us The Bomb
description: Win a round by planting a bomb
hint: Play as a Terrorist on any 'de_' map (like de_dust2). Plant the C4 at site A or B and ensure it detonates.

description: Plant 100 bombs
hint: You just need to plant the C4. You don't actually need to win the round for the plant to count towards the 100 total.

description: Defuse 100 bombs
hint: Play as a Counter-Terrorist. Always buy a Defuse Kit to cut the defusal time in half (from 10 seconds to 5 seconds).

description: Kill 25 enemies
hint: Unlocks naturally as you play the game.

description: Kill 500 enemies
hint: Unlocks naturally. Can be farmed quickly in Deathmatch or by playing offline with bots.

description: Kill 10,000 enemies
hint: A long-term grind. To farm, create an offline server with lots of harmless bots on a small map.

description: Successfully defuse a bomb with less than one second remaining
hint: Wait near the bomb until the beeping becomes extremely rapid. Start the defuse right at the last moment. A Defuse Kit makes timing this easier.

description: Defuse a bomb with a kit when it would have failed without one
hint: Ensure you have a Defuse Kit. Start the defusal process when the bomb timer has between 5 and 10 seconds remaining.

description: Kill a CT while he is defusing the bomb
hint: As a Terrorist, hide near the planted bomb. Wait until you hear the defusal sound cue, peek out, and kill the Counter-Terrorist.

description: Win a round by defusing a bomb
hint: As a Counter-Terrorist on a 'de_' map, let the Terrorists plant the C4, then eliminate them and successfully defuse it.

description: Plant a bomb within 25 seconds
hint: Play a map with a short run to the bomb site (like de_dust2 B site). Rush immediately with your knife out and plant as soon as you touch the site.

description: Win 10 rounds
hint: Unlocks naturally as you play.

description: Win 200 rounds
hint: Unlocks naturally over time.

description: Win 5000 rounds
hint: Long-term grind. Can be farmed offline by using console commands to speed up round times with bots.

description: Inflict 2,500 total points of damage to enemy players
hint: Unlocks naturally. A single kill is typically 100 points of damage.

description: Inflict 50,000 total points of damage to enemy players
hint: Unlocks naturally as you play.

description: Inflict 1,000,000 total points of damage to enemy players
hint: A major lifetime milestone. Corresponds roughly to 10,000 total kills.

description: Kill 5 enemy players within 15 seconds
hint: Best done offline against 'Easy' bots. Use a high-capacity weapon like the P90 or M249 and spray down a choke point.

description: KIll an enemy player with a gun they dropped that round
hint: Kill an enemy, pick up their primary weapon, and use it to kill another enemy (or the same enemy if they respawn in deathmatch).

description: Rescue 100 hostages
hint: Play on 'cs_' maps like cs_office. Press your 'Use' key on hostages and escort them to the rescue zone.

description: Rescue 500 hostages
hint: Play 'cs_' maps heavily, or farm against bots by rushing the hostage room.

description: Rescue all hostages in a single round
hint: Collect all 4 hostages on a map like cs_office and successfully escort them all to the rescue zone.

description: Rescue all hostages within 90 seconds
hint: Use a map with a very short distance to the hostage room, like cs_assault or cs_italy, and rush immediately.

description: Kill two enemy players with a single bullet
hint: Use the AWP. Wait at a narrow choke point (like the Dust2 double doors) for two enemies to line up, and shoot.

description: Earn $125,000 total cash
hint: Unlocks naturally. You earn money for getting kills, planting/defusing bombs, and winning/losing rounds.

description: Earn $2,500,000 total cash
hint: Unlocks naturally as you play.

description: Earn $50,000,000 total cash
hint: A massive lifetime grind achievement. Just keep playing.

description: Kill an enemy with a grenade after you've died
hint: During a firefight, throw an HE Grenade at the enemy's feet right before they deal the lethal shot to you.

description: Kill 200 enemy players with the Night Hawk .50c
hint: The 'Night Hawk .50c' is the Desert Eagle (Deagle).

description: Kill 200 enemy players with the KM Tactical .45
hint: The 'KM Tactical .45' is the USP (the default CT pistol).

description: Kill 200 enemy players with the 9x19 Sidearm
hint: The '9x19 Sidearm' is the Glock (the default Terrorist pistol).

description: Kill 200 enemy players with the 228 Compact
hint: The '228 Compact' is the P228.

description: Kill 100 enemy players with the .40 Dual Elites
hint: The '.40 Dual Elites' are the Dual Berettas (Terrorist only).

description: Kill 100 enemy players with the ES Five-Seven
hint: The 'ES Five-Seven' is the Five-SeveN (CT only).

description: Unlock all 6 Pistol kill achievements
hint: Complete the kill quotas for the Glock, USP, P228, Deagle, Five-SeveN, and Dual Elites.

description: Kill 1,000 enemy players with the Magnum Sniper Rifle
hint: The 'Magnum Sniper Rifle' is the AWP.

description: Kill 1,000 enemy players with the CV-47
hint: The 'CV-47' is the AK-47 (Terrorist only).

description: Kill 1,000 enemy players with the Maverick M4A1 Carbine
hint: The 'Maverick M4A1 Carbine' is the M4A1 (CT only).

description: Kill 500 enemy players with the Bullpup
hint: The 'Bullpup' is the AUG (CT only).

description: Kill 500 enemy players with the Krieg 552
hint: The 'Krieg 552' is the SG 552 (Terrorist only).

description: Kill 500 enemy players with the Krieg 550 Commando
hint: The 'Krieg 550 Commando' is the CT Auto-Sniper.

description: Kill 500 enemy players with the IDF Defender
hint: The 'IDF Defender' is the Galil (Terrorist only).

description: Kill 500 enemy players with the Clarion 5.56
hint: The 'Clarion 5.56' is the FAMAS (CT only).

description: Kill 1,000 enemy players with the Schmidt Scout
hint: The 'Schmidt Scout' is the Scout (light sniper rifle).

description: Kill 500 enemy players with the D3/AU-1
hint: The 'D3/AU-1' is the G3SG1 (Terrorist Auto-Sniper).

description: Unlock all 10 rifle kill achievements
hint: Complete the kill quotas for the AWP, AK47, M4A1, AUG, SG552, Auto-Snipers, Galil, FAMAS, and Scout.

description: Kill 1,000 enemy players with the ES C90
hint: The 'ES C90' is the P90.

description: Kill 1,000 enemy players with the KM Sub-Machine Gun
hint: The 'KM Sub-Machine Gun' is the MP5.

description: Kill 500 enemy players with the Schmidt Machine Pistol
hint: The 'Schmidt Machine Pistol' is the TMP (CT only).

description: Kill 500 enemy players with the Ingram Mac-10
hint: The 'Ingram Mac-10' is the MAC-10 (Terrorist only).

description: Kill 1,000 enemy players with the KM UMP45
hint: The 'KM UMP45' is the UMP-45.

description: Unlock all 5 sub-machine gun kill achievements
hint: Complete the kill quotas for the P90, MP5, TMP, MAC-10, and UMP-45.

description: Kill 200 enemy players with the Leone 12 Gauge Super
hint: The 'Leone 12 Gauge Super' is the M3 pump-action shotgun.

description: Kill 200 enemy players with the Leone YG1265 Auto Shotgun
hint: The 'Leone YG1265 Auto Shotgun' is the XM1014 automatic shotgun.

description: Unlock both shotgun kill achievements
hint: Complete the kill quotas for both the M3 and the XM1014 shotguns.

description: Kill 500 enemy players with the HE grenade
hint: Throw HE grenades into populated choke points. Can be farmed easily against offline bots.

description: Kill 100 enemy players with the knife
hint: Use the right-click (secondary fire) for a slower, high-damage stab that instantly kills from behind.

description: Kill 500 enemy players with the M249
hint: The M249 is the heavy machine gun. Buy it and spray down choke points.

description: Unlock every weapon kill achievement
hint: Earn all 'Expert' achievements for pistols, SMGs, rifles, shotguns, the machine gun, knife, and HE grenade.

description: Kill the entire enemy team (with at least 5 players) in a single round
hint: Get an 'Ace'. Very easy to do in a 5v5 bot match.

description: Get kills with 5 different guns in a round
hint: Get a kill with your primary, drop it, use your pistol, then pick up weapons from dead enemies.

description: Kill an enemy player who is leading the hostages without injuring any hostages
hint: As a Terrorist, wait for a CT to grab the hostages, then carefully headshot them without letting stray bullets hit a hostage.

description: Be the last player alive in a round (with at least 5 players on your team)
hint: Survive a brutal round where all 4+ of your teammates die, and you clutch the win.

description: Kill an enemy with the last bullet in your magazine (excluding sniper rifles)
hint: Fire your gun (like an AK47 or Deagle) into a wall until 1 bullet remains, then hunt down a weak enemy.

description: Kill an enemy player who is on a killing spree
hint: Kill an enemy who has secured 3 or more kills in the current round.

description: Shoot out 14 windows in a single round on cs_office
hint: Load up cs_office and simply shoot out all the large glass windows in the main office area.

description: Kill 250 enemy players with headshots
hint: Aim for the head. Will unlock naturally as you improve your crosshair placement.

description: Do at least 95% damage to an enemy who is then killed by a another player
hint: Hit an enemy with an AWP in the leg or chest, then let your teammate finish them off with a pistol or rifle.

description: Kill an enemy player who has been reduced to less than 5% health by other players
hint: Clean up a kill that your teammate heavily damaged (like finishing off an enemy hit by an AWP).

description: Kill an enemy player while they are reloading
hint: Push aggressively when you hear an enemy's gun click empty and they retreat to reload.

description: Kill a total of 25 enemy players blinded by flashbangs
hint: Throw a flashbang around a corner, peek immediately after it pops, and kill the enemies holding their arms up.

description: Kill an enemy player while you are blinded from a flashbang
hint: When you get flashed, rely on map knowledge and sound to keep spraying where you know the enemy is.

description: Kill 100 enemy players with enemy weapons
hint: As a CT, pick up dropped AK-47s or Galils. As a T, pick up dropped M4A1s or FAMAS rifles.

description: Get a kill with every weapon
hint: Requires at least one kill with every single firearm, the knife, and the HE grenade.

description: Take 80 points of damage from enemy grenades and still survive the round
hint: Buy Kevlar + Helmet to survive the blast, stand near an exploding HE grenade, and hide for the rest of the round.

description: Win a knife fight
hint: Kill an enemy wielding a knife while you are also wielding a knife.

description: Win 100 knife fights
hint: Can be farmed quickly by starting a local server with bots restricted to knives only.

description: Kill the defuser with an HE grenade
hint: As a Terrorist, wait until you hear the defuse sound, then bounce an HE grenade perfectly onto the bomb site.

description: Survive a shot to the head because you had the good sense to wear a helmet
hint: Buy Kevlar + Helmet. Get shot in the head by a weapon that doesn't 1-shot armored targets (like a Glock or long-range M4A1).

description: Kill an enemy with an un-zoomed sniper rifle
hint: Use the AWP or Scout and 'no-scope' an enemy. Easiest when they are right in front of you.

description: Kill a zoomed-in enemy sniper with a sniper rifle of your own
hint: Win a classic sniper duel against someone who is actively looking through their scope.

description: Kill a zoomed-in enemy sniper with a knife
hint: Flank an enemy sniper who is hard-scoping down a lane, sneak up behind them, and right-click with the knife.

description: Kill 100 zoomed-in enemy snipers
hint: Focus on killing players who are using the AWP, Scout, or Auto-Snipers while aimed down sights.

description: Kill an enemy while at 1 health
hint: Survive a fight with exactly 1 HP, and then get another kill. Can be staged easily with bots by shooting each other in the foot.

description: Kill 3 enemy players with a single HE grenade
hint: Throw a grenade into a heavily congested choke point where multiple injured enemies are standing.

description: Kill an enemy player with a knife during the pistol round
hint: During the very first round of a half (when players only have $800 and pistols), secure a knife kill.

description: Win a round in less than 30 seconds (against at least 5 enemy players)
hint: Easiest offline. Set up a 5v5 bot match on a small map and wipe them out immediately with an AWP or P90.

description: Win 5 Pistol Rounds
hint: Win the first round of the half 5 times.

description: Win 25 Pistol Rounds
hint: Win the first round of the half 25 times.

description: Win 250 Pistol Rounds
hint: Win the first round of the half 250 times.

description: Kill 5 players in a C4 blast
hint: Easiest offline with bots. Plant the bomb, let the CT bots surround it to defuse, and let it explode.

description: As the last living terrorist, distract a defuser long enough for the bomb to explode
hint: When a CT taps the bomb to defuse, shoot near them or step out to make them stop defusing and engage you, stalling until it blows up.

description: Win a round by picking up the bomb from a fallen comrade and successfully planting it
hint: Let the bomb carrier die, pick up the dropped C4, plant it, and ensure it detonates.

description: Survive damage from 5 different players within a round
hint: Take small amounts of chip damage (like a single bullet or grenade splash) from 5 unique enemies and survive.

description: Kill the entire opposing team without any members of your team dying
hint: Wipe out the enemy team perfectly. Easier in bot matches on 'Easy' difficulty.

description: Kill the entire opposing team without any members of your team taking any damage
hint: Wipe out the enemy team without a single CT or T taking a single point of damage. Very easy with harmless bots.

description: Break 15 props in a single round
hint: Play cs_office and shoot the computers, mugs, pots, and filing cabinets.

description: Use Dual Elites to kill an enemy player that also has Dual Elites equipped
hint: Both you and the enemy must be wielding the Dual Berettas when you kill them.

description: Spray 100 decals
hint: Press 'T' (default spray key) to place your spray on a wall. Do this 100 times over your career.

description: Do 5,000 damage with nightvision active
hint: Buy Nightvision goggles, turn them on, and play normally until you deal 5,000 damage.

description: Kill 10 enemy players in a single round
hint: Requires playing on a server with at least 10 enemies (e.g., a 10v10 or 16v16 community server).

description: Kill an enemy player who has just killed 10 of your teammates in a single round
hint: Requires a 10v10+ server. Let an enemy wipe out 10 of your teammates, then kill them.

description: Kill 5 enemy players with headshots in a single round
hint: Easiest offline with bots. Use an AK-47, Desert Eagle, or AWP and aim for the head.

description: Win 100 rounds on the CS_Assault map
hint: To farm quickly, create an offline bot match, open the developer console, and type 'mp_maxrounds 100' and 'bot_kill' to instantly win rounds.

description: Win 100 rounds on the CS_Compound map
hint: Win 100 rounds on cs_compound.

description: Win 100 rounds on the CS_Havana map
hint: Win 100 rounds on cs_havana.

description: Win 100 rounds on the CS_Italy map
hint: Win 100 rounds on cs_italy.

description: Win 100 rounds on the CS_Militia map
hint: Win 100 rounds on cs_militia.

description: Win 100 rounds on the CS_Office map
hint: Win 100 rounds on cs_office.

description: Win 100 rounds on the DE_Aztec map
hint: Win 100 rounds on de_aztec.

description: Win 100 rounds on the DE_Cbble map
hint: Win 100 rounds on de_cbble.

description: Win 100 rounds on the DE_Chateau map
hint: Win 100 rounds on de_chateau.

description: Win 100 rounds on the DE_Dust map
hint: Win 100 rounds on de_dust.

description: Win 100 rounds on the DE_Dust2 map
hint: Win 100 rounds on de_dust2.

description: Win 100 rounds on the DE_Inferno map
hint: Win 100 rounds on de_inferno.

description: Win 100 rounds on the DE_Nuke map
hint: Win 100 rounds on de_nuke.

description: Win 100 rounds on the DE_Piranesi map
hint: Win 100 rounds on de_piranesi.

description: Win 100 rounds on the DE_Port map
hint: Win 100 rounds on de_port.

description: Win 100 rounds on the DE_Prodigy map
hint: Win 100 rounds on de_prodigy.

description: Win 100 rounds on the DE_Tides map
hint: Win 100 rounds on de_tides.

description: Win 100 rounds on the DE_Train map
hint: Win 100 rounds on de_train.

description: Kill an enemy player while you are airborne
hint: Jump off a ledge or structure and spray an enemy before you hit the ground. Shotguns and P90s work best for this.

description: Kill an airborne enemy
hint: Shoot an enemy while they are jumping around a corner or falling.

description: Kill an airborne enemy while you are also airborne
hint: Play on maps with jump-pads, low gravity servers, or just coordinate jumping at the same time with a bot.

description: Win a round while making no footstep noise and killing at least one enemy
hint: Hold the 'Walk' key (Shift) for the entire round. Do not run or jump. Get a kill, and win the round.

description: Win a round without your team killing any enemy players
hint: Win via the objective (like the C4 exploding) without anyone on your team getting a kill.

description: Donate 100 weapons to your teammates
hint: Buy weapons at spawn and drop them (G) for your teammates.

description: Win 10 rounds without dying and not spending any cash
hint: Survive 10 rounds using only your starting pistol or by picking up weapons off the ground, without accessing the buy menu.

description: Stop defusing to kill a terrorist and then successfully finish defusing the bomb
hint: Start defusing the C4, let go of the 'Use' key, kill an attacking Terrorist, and then finish defusing the C4.

description: Kill an enemy player within 3 seconds of them recovering a dropped bomb
hint: As a CT, guard a dropped C4 package. When a Terrorist runs over it to pick it up, kill them immediately.

description: Dominate an enemy player
hint: Kill the same enemy player 4 times in a row without them killing you.

description: Dominate a total of 10 enemy players
hint: Unlocks naturally as you play the game and perform well against specific opponents.

description: Kill an opponent you are already dominating
hint: Once you have the Domination icon over a player, kill them a 5th time.

description: Get a total of 100 kills on enemy players you are dominating
hint: Keep hunting down players you have already dominated.

description: Kill an enemy player that is dominating you
hint: When an enemy has the Nemesis icon over their head (meaning they killed you 4 times), kill them.

display_name: Can't Keep a Good Man Down
description: Kill a total of 20 enemy players that are dominating you
hint: Secure 20 Revenge kills over your career.

description: Start a round with all players on your team wearing the same uniform (at least 5 players)
hint: Have all 5+ players on your team choose the exact same player model (e.g., Phoenix Connexion) in the team select menu.

description: Dominate three enemy players simultaneously
hint: Have active dominations on 3 different enemies at the same time in a single match.

description: Get 10 kills on enemy players you are already dominating during a single match
hint: Focus completely on players you've dominated and kill them 10 more times before the map changes.

description: Kill an enemy player 4 additional times while you are dominating them
hint: Get 8 kills in a row on the exact same player without them killing you.

description: Kill two enemy players while you are blinded from a flashbang
hint: Throw a flashbang at your feet near multiple enemies and spray them down while your screen is completely white.

description: Start a round on the same team as 4 of your friends, with all of you wearing the same outfit
hint: Queue into a server with 4 Steam friends, join the same team, and all select the exact same player model.

description: Blind an enemy player who then kills a teammate
hint: Requires 'mp_friendlyfire 1' enabled on the server. Flash an enemy and have them accidentally shoot their own teammate.

description: Kill an enemy player in the same round as they kill a player on your friends list
hint: Play on the same team as a Steam friend. When they die, kill the person who killed them in that same round.

description: Win a match of at least 10 players where the entirety of each team is composed of a single clan.
hint: Requires a 5v5 match where all players on Team A have the exact same Steam group clan tag, and all on Team B have a different clan tag.

description: Get two kills standing in the same spot with a zoomed sniper rifle.
hint: Find a good camping spot (like T-spawn in Dust2) and get two kills without un-zooming or moving your feet.

description: Collect three gifts dropped by opponents.
hint: Originally part of the 2011 Steam Holiday Sale. You must play during a seasonal event or on a server with holiday mode forced on to collect the dropped gifts.
